items.title: ggml/llama.cpp releases: b10067
items.description:
<details open>

llama-quant : exclude i32 ffn_gate_tid2eid routing table from quantization (#25787)

DeepSeek-V4's ffn_gate_tid2eid tensor is an i32 token-id -> expert-id
index table, not weights. It was never added to the name-based
exclusion list alongside ffn_gate_inp.weight, so llama-quantize tr
items.geo_title: Why is the i32 ffn_gate_tid2eid excluded from quantization in ggml/llama.cpp?

items.title: 10 Open-Source No-Code AI Platforms for Building LLM Apps, RAG Systems, and AI Agents
items.description:
Retrieval, agents, and workflows now ship as visual and plain-English tools. This roundup covers 10 open-source no-code and low-code platforms for building LLM apps, RAG systems, and AI agents, each with its verified license, repository, and best-fit use case.

The post

items.title: Fine-Tuning Qwen3 with LoRA Using NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel: A Complete Single-GPU Google Colab Workflow Tutorial
items.description: We build an end-to-end NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel workflow in Google Colab using a single GPU. We verify CUDA hardware and precision support, install NeMo AutoModel from source, and load an official Qwen3-0.6B LoRA recipe. We then adapt its precision, batch size, checkpointing, and scheduler settings
items.geo_title: How does fine-tuning Qwen3 with LoRA on a single GPU work?

items.title: NVIDIA Released DeepStream 9.1: Bringing Agentic AI to Vision AI With 13 Skills and Multi-View 3D Tracking
items.description: NVIDIA DeepStream 9.1 introduces 13 agentic skills that let coding agents like Claude Code and Codex build multi-camera video analytics pipelines from natural-language prompts. Multi-View 3D Tracking (MV3DT) fuses per-camera detections into one shared 3D world with a globally consistent object ID
items.geo_title: Why Is NVIDIA's DeepStream 9.1 Revolutionizing Vision AI With Agentic Skills?

items.title: Google Cloud’s Always-On Memory Agent Replaces RAG and Embeddings With Continuous LLM Consolidation on Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite
items.description: Google Cloud's generative-ai repository ships the Always-On Memory Agent, a reference implementation that treats memory as a running process. Built on Google ADK and Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite, it uses no vector database and no embeddings. Instead, an orchestrator routes to Ingest, Consolidate, and Qu

items.title: Sakana AI’s Error Diffusion Trains Dale-Compliant Dual-Stream Networks, Reaching 96.7% MNIST and 61.7% CIFAR-10 Without Backpropagation
items.description: Backpropagation relies on weight transport, which biological circuits likely cannot implement. Sakana AI's Error Diffusion sidesteps that constraint, training dual-stream excitatory/inhibitory networks that obey Dale's principle. This piece breaks down how modulo error routing scales the rule fro

faq_items.question: Why do AI company logos look like buttholes?
faq_items.answer: The logo design for an AI company was inspired by a visual pun, using the shape of a butthole to represent data processing and computational power.

faq_items.question: What did AI do to StackOverflow according to recent news?
faq_items.answer: A graph showed that AI tools significantly increased coding efficiency on StackOverflow, drastically reducing question volumes as users solved problems more quickly with AI assistance.

faq_items.question: Can landlords use AI images for advertising properties now?
faq_items.answer: According to Mayor Mamdani's new regulations, landlords are prohibited from using AI-generated images in property advertisements to prevent misleading representations and ensure transparency.

faq_items.question: Is there a global crisis due to AI overuse?
faq_items.answer: Yes, some experts argue that excessive focus on AI is undermining critical decision-making processes worldwide, leading to potential misallocations of resources and priorities.

faq_items.question: What is Forall and how does it work?
faq_items.answer: Forall is a platform that enables developers to create AI models using formal verification techniques, ensuring the accuracy and reliability of code through specification-driven development.
